chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6464 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.27612/2021 2. For hearing of main case 14.04.2025 Mr. Muhammad Aleem, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Mehmood Anwar, advocate for respondent Mr. Hafeezullah advocate holds brief for Mr. Touqeer Ahmed, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Pursuant to last order Mr. Tariq Hussain Shaikh, Commissioner I.R. Zone-III, LTO, Karachi is present and states that the present lis is squarely covered by a Division Bench judgment of this Court reported as 2023 PTD 576, therefore, may be disposed of in mutatis mutandis application of the same reasoning and upon the same terms. Order accordingly. The presence and assistance of learned officer is appreciated. Judge Judge Amjad
